lecture_example: Long asset falls; option value changes with spot, volatility, time, rates, and dividends
measurement: Greeks, what-if grids, VaR/CVaR, stress tests

lecture_example: Shareholder receives dividend, but call holder does not and can be pushed out of the money
measurement: Ex-dividend scenario and option Greek sensitivity
control: Corporate-action calendar and option repricing check

lecture_example: Indian investor long Tesla can make or lose INR P&L from USD/INR even if Tesla is flat
measurement: Portfolio currency exposure and FX stress
control: FX hedge or currency exposure limit

lecture_example: Broker, client, clearing house, or exchange failure
measurement: PD x LGD x EAD and unexpected-loss capital

lecture_example: LTCM used leveraged bond arbitrage and faced Russia-default and liquidity shocks
measurement: Leverage, downgrade sensitivity, funding stress, margin call path
control: Leverage cap, liquidity reserve, funding source diversification

lecture_example: Storage, server, old code, price feed, or order-gateway failure
measurement: Latency, capacity, heartbeat, deployment checksum, incident drill
control: Pretrade gateway checks and production release gates

lecture_example: No counterparty at the other end or widening spread around news
measurement: Order-book depth, ADV participation, market impact, liquidity-adjusted VaR
control: Size limits, pause rules, participation cap

lecture_example: Short-selling ban, margin increase, tax/tariff change, or market-wide position limit
measurement: News analysis, historical event response, rule inventory
control: Regulatory monitor and strategy disable switch
